chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-337 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 26.02.2026 M/s. Ghulam Fareed Baloch and Sajid Baloch, Advocates for the petitioner M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith SIP Muhammad Aslam, P.S Pak Colony, Karachi ---------------------- Police official files statement alongwith copy of FIR No.57 of 2026 registered with police station S.I.U, Karachi for the offences under section 4 and 5 of Explosive Act, taken on record. Since the alleged missing person has been surfaced therefore petition in hand has become infructuous. When confronted, counsel for the petitioner does not wish to press this petition, which too is not opposed by the other side. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
